signals.headline: Powell Confirms Tariffs Drive Most Goods Price Overrun, Core Inflation ~2% Ex-Tariffs; Goods Inflation to Peak Q1 2026;
signals.raw:
Powell Confirms Tariffs Drive Most Goods Price Overrun, Core Inflation ~2% Ex-Tariffs; Goods Inflation to Peak Q1 2026; Q1 GDP Growth Slowing on Import Surge Ahead of Tariffs** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1][2][3]

Powell stated in recent remarks that **most of the overrun in goods prices is from tariffs**, not excess demand, with core PCE inflation running just above 2% when excluding tariff
matched_markets: Will Powell say "Tariff inflation" during April press conference?
